subject: 178 events ready for MongoDB load
body:
Porter,

## Ready for Load

- **178 events** export-ready in SQLite
- **153 venues** with lat/lng
- Overnight run in progress (2/248 groups done)

## SQLite Location

`ai-discovered/via-openclaw/fb-conditioner/data/fb_conditioner.sqlite`

## Schema Doc

`fb-conditioner/docs/SCHEMA.md`

## Notes

- More events arriving as overnight run continues
- Run `link-venues.ts` before loading to link any new events
- Events have sync_status_test and sync_status_prod columns for tracking

— Booker
